center.name: 查尔斯·达尔文
center.summary: 查尔斯·达尔文是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括缨冠蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|right|alt=|Figure 48 from The Descent of Man, and Selection in Relation to Sex by [[Charles Darwin ]] The tufted coquette (Lophornis ornatus) is a tiny hummingbird that breeds in eastern Venezuela, Trinidad, Guiana, and northern Brazil
